Source: Power Automate Documentation
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-automate/
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Power Automate Documentation

## Key Capabilities
- Automated, scheduled, and desktop flows
- AI copilot in cloud flows, Process Mining, desktop flows
- Process mining and task mining
- Business process flows
- Solutions and ALM
- Integration with Teams, SharePoint, email, Forms, Approvals

## Create and Design
- Try/Buy Power Automate
- Create automated, scheduled, and desktop flows
- AI copilot capabilities in cloud flows, Process Mining, desktop flows
- Process mining and task mining
- Solutions for ALM
- Integration with Teams, SharePoint, email

## Best Practices
- Plan a Power Automate project
- Automation Kit for managing, governing, and scaling adoption
- Best practices for automation adoption

## Administration
- Power Platform admin center
- Environment management
- Data loss prevention policies

## Developer
- Enterprise developer and ISV guide
- Cloud flows via code
- Desktop flows via code
- Custom connectors
